title: Asking the way
tagline: Where's the shop, is it far, which bus - finding your way on the street.

lines.fi: Anteeks, tietsä missä on lähin kauppa?
lines.en: Excuse me, do you know where the nearest shop is?

lines.fi: Joo, se on ton kadun päässä, oikeella.
lines.en: Yeah, it's at the end of that street, on the right.
Does this street go to the centre?

lines.fi: Menee, mut on nopeempaa mennä bussilla.
lines.en: It does, but it's faster to go by bus.
Where do I get a bus ticket?
Straight from the driver, or from the app.
No problem. Have a good rest of your day!
